(Discharge): Parenteral CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed parenteral/IV feedings in the last three days of the resident's stay at the facility. 0=No

916 FEED_TUBE_ADMSN_CD FEED_TUBE_ADMSN_CD K0520B1 Nutritional Approaches (Admission): Feeding tube CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed a feeding tube days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes
